title: phyllanthus coalcomanensis
intro: Phyllanthus coalcomanensis, also known as the coalcoman tree, is a plant species native to Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating gastrointestinal issues, and exhibiting potential antiviral activity. In traditional medicine, Phyllanthus coalcomanensis is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves can be dried and used in herbal infusions.
